name: Marsala Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: Salt and white pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the shallot in the butter over medium heat for 5 minutes until softened.
2. Add the marsala wine and thyme, reducing the liquid by half.
3. Stir in the heavy cream and simmer until reduced by half.
4. Gradually add the cubed butter to emulsify the sauce.
5. Season with salt and white pepper.
6. Keep warm until ready to serve.
